title: Rogersonanthus tepuiensis
taxonomy: Rogersonanthus tepuiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This classification places Rogersonanthus tepuiensis within the larger group of orchids, which are one of the most diverse and widespread families of flowering plants. The genus Rogersonanthus is a relatively recent addition to the Orchidaceae family, and it contains a small number of species found primarily in South America. Rogersonanthus tepuiensis is one of these species, and it is known to be endemic to the tepuis, a unique region of table-topped mountains in Venezuela. The classification of Rogersonanthus tepuiensis as an orchid highlights its unique characteristics and adaptations as a member of this distinct family of flowering plants.
